instructions.instruction: **Identify the bottleneck** — confirm the slow call site before writing any benchmarks; if the profile output is ambiguous, re-run with a larger workload to amplify signal

instructions.instruction: **Save baseline** — write results to `bench/baseline.json` and check for regressions (>10% threshold); if a regression is detected, compare against the previous 3 baseline runs before raising an error to rule out noise
